channel.title: Planetterrian Daily
channel.description: Daily science, longevity, and health discoveries. A tribe of forward-thinking innovators passionate about the planet, intertwining technology and compassion.
channel.itunes:author: Patrick
channel.itunes:summary: Daily science, longevity, and health discoveries. Technology as a force for good, sustainability, and environmental consciousness.
